query: SELECT id, name, catStatus, adoptedDate, LEFT(photoUrl, 60) as photoUrl_short FROM cats WHERE catStatus IN ('adopted', 'adopted_in_lounge') ORDER BY adoptedDate DESC LIMIT 20;
